name: Neua Daet Diao (Fried Sun-Dried Beef)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the beef and cut it into slices about 1/3 inch thick.
2. Pound the garlic, coriander root, and pepper in a mortar until finely chopped.
3. Add the beef slices to the mixture and work them around so they are well coated.
4. Incorporate the fish sauce, oyster sauce, whiskey, sugar, and curry powder into the beef mixture. Mix thoroughly and allow it to marinate for one hour.
5. Place the beef slices on a rack and leave in the sun for one day. Turn occasionally.
6. Fry the sun-dried beef in hot oil until crispy, then drain and serve with sweet chili sauce.
